subject: Congratulations - next steps for {{role}}
body:
Hello {{candidateName}},

Congratulations!

We are delighted to inform you that you have successfully cleared the interview process and have been selected for the {{role}} position.

Your performance throughout the evaluation process demonstrated strong technical skills, problem-solving ability, and enthusiasm for learning.

Next Steps
Review the onboarding details provided below.
Complete any required documentation.
Expected Joining Date: {{joiningDate}}

Further instructions will be shared with you shortly.

Complete Onboarding: {{onboardingLink}}

Congratulations once again, and welcome aboard!

Best regards,
AgentHire Team
